form.formComment: Comes here off a 32-day let-up. At the latest run 3rd in a small field at Chelmsford on March 7 over 1200m, 1.75 len behind Tyger Bay with 56kg at $2.80. The race before that favourite; scored a big 5 len win at Wolverhampton March 2 over 1000m defeating Gustav Graves carrying 58kg at $4. Very tough to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Anticipated the start and slowly away as a result.

form.formComment: Comes off a 61 day let-up. Most recently tried to lead throughout but was claimed late 3rd of 10 at Newcastle All Weather on February 6 over 1000m, neck behind Dark Kestrel carrying 58.5kg at $34. Before that ran last of 8 at Newcastle All Weather on January 22 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Vantheman with 55kg at $51. Expected to feature.

form.formComment: At the latest run 2nd of 7 at Chelmsford on March 26 over 1000m, 2.25 len behind Skellig Isle with 61kg at $13. The run before that 3rd of 7 at Chelmsford on February 26 over 1000m, 5 len behind Arklow Lad carrying 59kg at $29. Worth plenty of thought.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months 6th of 17 at Doncaster on March 29 over 1000m, 3 len behind Spoof with 58.5kg at $29. Previously second-up ran last of 12 at Southwell All Weather on September 29 over 1000m, 13 len behind Sturlasson with 61kg at $34. Rates highly and expected to do much better with that run under her belt.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Denied a clear run from the 2- furlong marker to the final furlong marker.
Denied a clear run one furlong out.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of five-and-a-half months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation fourth of 8 at Bath October 20 over 1000m, on rain affected going; 1.0 len behind Jax Edge with 58kg at $13. When resuming last campaign seventh of 9 at Lingfield All Weather February 16 2025 over 1000m, 3 len behind Commendation carrying 61kg at $21. Likely to run well.
